case_title: HANNAH GOMEZ FARIAS VS. BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-31-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HANNAH GOMEZ FARIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED MAR-06-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FARIAS, HANNAH GOMEZ AS TO DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARIAS, HANNAH GOMEZ AS TO DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARIAS, HANNAH GOMEZ AS TO DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-05-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HANNAH GOMEZ FARIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-07-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HANNAH GOMEZ FARIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS THE FILED PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAR-08-2023 IS INVALID. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT BIGGS BUCHANAN PROPERTIES WAS NOT SERVED PURSUANT TO THE SERVICE INFORMATION LISTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE IS IDENTIFIED AS D ALLEN BIGGS AT ONE FRONT STREET SUITE 1300, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO RE-SERVE CLAIM TO THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-05-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
